title: Myopia
description: Makes all textures use bilinear filtering.
body:
This mod makes every texture loaded use bilinear filtering by a low-level mixin into Blaze3D.
![A picture of the uploader's Skyblock world with shaders on, and bilinear filtering on all of the textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/927e9ba171396dc925ab9203d6347228e4f2a1e2.png)
